cit.basis: Flat 29.5% corporate income tax under the general regime (Régimen General, Ley del Impuesto a la Renta — LIR).

mype_tributario.note: Régimen MYPE Tributario (D.Leg. 1269): 10% on the first 15 UIT of net income (UIT 2025 = S/ 5,350 → S/ 80,250), 29.5% on the excess.

cit.note: Administered by SUNAT. Special regimes (RER, Nuevo RUS, agriculture, mining stability agreements) are out of scope for this SME estimator.

wht.note: 5% withholding tax on dividends and other profit distributions to individuals and non-residents.

vat.note: IGV (Impuesto General a las Ventas) at 18%, composed of 16% IGV proper plus 2% IPM (Impuesto de Promoción Municipal).

itan.note: ITAN (Temporary Net Assets Tax): 0.4% on net assets above S/ 1,000,000; creditable against income tax.

labour.note: Employer health contribution (EsSalud) 9%; pension via ONP 13% or private AFP; CTS and statutory gratuities (July/December) apply to payroll.

official_sources.name: SUNAT — Superintendencia Nacional de Aduanas y de Administración Tributaria

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
MYPE eligibility caps (income ≤ 1,700 UIT), special regimes, loss carry-forward, and sector rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
